race_meta.race_name: Get The Best Odds With Oddschecker Mares' Handicap Chase (GBB Race)

ruby.title: Probability Analysis
ruby.insight: Model placed irish chorus at position 2 (18.0% probability) vs top pick She Is For Me Boys (34.0%). Underestimated winning horse by ~16.0 percentage points.

keenan.title: Forecast & Distribution
keenan.insight: Top forecast prediction was She Is For Me Boys > Irish Chorus, but actual result was Irish Chorus > Politacus. Distribution model underestimated variance in placing combinations.

mordin.title: Market Alignment
mordin.insight: Winner Irish Chorus had well-aligned model/market values (divergence -2.0%). Market pricing efficient for this outcome.
